calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Continued To Aug-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Set For Trial On Feb-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANGELA N. O' ROURKE OF SQUIRE & SANDERS, TEL. NO. 954-0351 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT OCEANIC BANK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to plead facts specifying how she was compelled to publish the defamation (e.g. to prospective employers), to whom, where and when. Plaintiff concedes she cannot now state a cause of action for written defamation or libel. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Not reported. =(302/CK)
